Regulatory Insights

Our team tracks antitrust, privacy, employment, and financial-services developments affecting public companies, private funds, and emerging growth businesses.

This portal consolidates alerts, explainers, and practical checklists so operating teams can understand the issue, assess exposure, and coordinate a response.

Popular Resources

  • Privacy Toolkit
  • Employment Handbook
  • Deal Terms Guide

FTC updates non-compete enforcement priorities

The latest staff guidance focuses on market power, worker mobility, and the interaction between state statutes and federal oversight.

SEC cybersecurity disclosures after the first filing wave

Early filings show recurring gaps in incident materiality analysis, board oversight descriptions, and remediation detail.

Subscribe for updates.
